title: Cathay Securities Investment Trust Selects ICE FactSet Global Top 50 Brands Index for New ETF
text: ATLANTA & NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ICE announced today that Cathay Securities Investment Trust has selected the ICE FactSet® Global Top 50 Brands Index for a newly launched ETF.

title: Will The Housing Deep Freeze Sink Intercontinental Exchange's Earnings?
text: The housing market has fallen off a cliff in 2022. Intercontinental Exchange's plans for this huge market are being forced to adjust.

title: Intercontinental Exchange: Inflation-Beating Dividends
text: Inflation is rising faster than expected, which is now creating one of the most difficult macro environments for the Fed in recent history. However, stock price weakness is offering new buying opportunities, which includes Intercontinental Exchange, which has high (expected) dividend growth.

title: Intercontinental Exchange Publishes Seventh Annual Sustainability Report
text: ATLANTA & NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Intercontinental Exchange today released the company's annual sustainability report, which includes ESG highlights from the last year.

title: Intercontinental Exchange Reports August 2022 Statistics
text: ATLANTA & NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Intercontinental Exchange today reported August 2022 trading volume and related revenue statistics.

title: Intercontinental Exchange: The House Always Wins
text: Intercontinental Exchange is a fantastic business in a fantastic industry - a rare 'natural monopoly' whose returns are not regulated. I estimate a potential upside of 45% gain for its share price.
